name: Your Space
summary: Your profile IS a holospace: one κ-sealed world — wallpaper, song, Top 8 doors, wall — carried whole inside one link. Step into anyone's space from any phone or desktop browser with no signup, no app, no server; make it yours in one tap.

description.p: MySpace's loop — see a page, want one, make yours, share the link — rebuilt on the holospace laws. A profile is a v2 identity tuple (name, look, song, doors, wall, lineage) whose κ is BLAKE3 of its canonical bytes; the link carries the canonical bytes themselves (#p=v2.<b64url>), so a cold peer reconstructs the exact space with zero servers and the fragment never reaches one.

The gesture MySpace never had: fork. 'Make It Mine' on any visited space mints a new κ under the visitor — the look survives, identity fields clear, lineage records 'via <name>', and the parent becomes the fork's first door, so attention flows back up the chain.

ul: One link = the whole space — self-contained, server-blind, L5-refused if mangled
Make It Mine: one-tap fork with lineage and a door back to the parent
Profile song: full track via the holo-music-ctl bus in-OS, 30s preview anywhere
Top 8 doors teleport between spaces in place (hashchange, no reload)
Every edit is a mint — the doc is the page (Playground law)

releases.description: S0-S2 of HOLO-YOURSPACE-PROMPT.md: the profile skin (avatar · name · song · Top 8 · wall · κ badge), Make It Mine fork with lineage + door-back, self-contained #p=v2 link, mood-keyed pure-CSS wallpapers, iTunes song search + holo-music-ctl weld, navigator.share. Witness 17/17.
